name: agent402-client
description: Tiny buyer-side client for Agent402 (x402): resolve a task to a tool and call it with payment handled for you — free tools settle via built-in proof-of-work (no wallet), wallet-only tools via your x402 fetch. Caching + idempotent retries.
author: Mikey Petrillo (https://github.com/MikeyPetrillo)
